required_preferences.fact: Only walks her dog for up to 15 minutes per day, regardless of weekday or weekend; dog walking service handles any additional exercise for her dog until cleared by therapist

supersedes.fact: Relies on a dog walking service for weekday morning walks — only walks her dog herself on weekends or when her schedule allows

required_preferences.fact: Schedules one-on-one check-ins with department leads and senior staff monthly, no longer meeting regularly with junior accountants outside her direct reports.

supersedes.fact: Schedules one-on-one check-ins with junior accountants from other departments every week, beyond her regular team

required_preferences.fact: Reviews nonprofit financial guidelines monthly to stay current — never relies solely on prior experience for new client issues
Listens exclusively to true crime podcasts during solo errands — never music or other genres
Reserves Sunday afternoons for reading historical fiction — never schedules chores or work during this time
Plans one nature day trip per month with her daughter — never repeats the same hiking trail twice in a season

persona: A mid-career accountant at a regional firm specializing in nonprofit organizations
